user.title: OBD2 Ducato Setup
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your KONNWEI KW905 OBD2 adapter. The MAC address is printed on the adapter label, or you can find it using a Bluetooth scanner app on your phone.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address. Use format XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX
error.bt_connect_failed: Could not connect to the OBD2 adapter. Make sure it is plugged in and Bluetooth is enabled.

abort.already_configured: This OBD2 adapter is already configured.
